meta.description: Test your real mental age with 7 interactive cognitive mini-challenges! Memory, reaction speed, pattern recognition, focus and more. Share your brain scan results!
meta.keywords: mental age test, brain age test, cognitive test, memory test, reaction speed test, brain scan
meta.og_title: Mental Age Test - 7 Brain Challenges | DopaBrain
meta.og_description: Complete 7 cognitive mini-challenges to discover your true mental age! Memory grid, reaction speed, pattern recognition and more.
meta.twitter_description: Complete 7 cognitive mini-challenges to discover your true mental age!

intro.title: Mental Age Test
intro.subtitle: 7 Cognitive Mini-Challenges
intro.description: Complete 7 brain challenges to discover your real mental age.
intro.description_2: Memory, speed, focus, pattern recognition and more!

challenge.memory_instruction: Memorize the highlighted cells. After they disappear, tap the same 5 cells.
challenge.reaction_instruction: Wait for the screen to turn green, then tap as fast as you can!
challenge.pattern_instruction: Find the missing piece that completes the pattern.
challenge.word_instruction: Pick the word most closely related to the one shown. You have 5 seconds!
challenge.stroop_instruction: A color word will appear in a different color. Tap the COLOR you see, not the word!
challenge.stroop_hint: Tap the COLOR, not the word!
challenge.emotion_instruction: Read the situation and identify the emotion being expressed.
challenge.number_instruction: Remember the number sequence shown, then type it back from memory.

emotion.scenario_1: A friend waves at you with a big smile after a long time apart.
emotion.scenario_2: Someone cuts in line right in front of you after you've been waiting.
emotion.scenario_3: You have a big presentation tomorrow but haven't finished preparing.

category.child_description: Your brain operates with the wonder and spontaneity of youth. You approach problems with fresh eyes and creative solutions. While some cognitive areas are still developing, your imaginative thinking is a powerful gift.
category.teenager_description: Your mind moves fast and takes risks. You have strong reaction times and aren't afraid to think outside the box. Your cognitive style blends energy with emerging analytical skills.
category.youngAdult_description: Your brain is firing on all cylinders. You show strong performance across memory, speed, and reasoning. This is the cognitive sweet spot where quick thinking meets mature judgment.
category.matureMind_description: Your cognitive profile reflects deep processing and careful analysis. You excel at pattern recognition and emotional intelligence. Your brain prioritizes accuracy and understanding over raw speed.
category.elderSage_tagline: The wisdom of ages in every thought!
category.elderSage_description: Your mind processes the world through layers of wisdom and reflection. You have exceptional emotional reading ability and pattern recognition. Your cognitive strength lies in depth of understanding.

share.twitterText: My mental age is {age}! I got {type} {emoji}. What's yours?
